---
title: "Update Accounting Vendor"
description: "Update an accounting vendor's name or code."
api: "PATCH https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/accounting/vendors/{vendor_id}"
---

## Path Parameters

<ParamField path="vendor_id" type="string" required>The Ramp ID of the vendor to update.</ParamField>

## Request

<ParamField body="name" type="string">Updated vendor name.</ParamField>
<ParamField body="code" type="string">Updated vendor code.</ParamField>
<ParamField body="reactivate" type="boolean">Set to `true` to reactivate a deactivated vendor.</ParamField>

## Response

<ResponseField name="accounting_connection_id" type="string" required />
<ResponseField name="id" type="string" />
<ResponseField name="ramp_id" type="string" required />
<ResponseField name="name" type="string" required />
<ResponseField name="code" type="string" />
<ResponseField name="is_active" type="boolean" required />
<ResponseField name="is_synced" type="boolean" required />
<ResponseField name="provider_name" type="string" required />
<ResponseField name="created_at" type="string (date)" required />
<ResponseField name="updated_at" type="string (date)" required />
